title: Requirement of licensure or certification
doc_html:
§2351.2.  Requirement of licensure or certification

No person may perform any lead hazard reduction activities in the state, unless licensed pursuant to R.S. 30:2351.4 or certified pursuant to R.S. 30:2351.6.

Acts 1993, No. 224, §1.
